_note: Derek × Claude predictions scoreboard. Boolean-driven (⊤ ⊥ ∅ ↻). Agency 🔧 vs World 🌍 tags. Confidence tiers: Certain, Almost Certain, Highly Likely, Probable, Chances About Even, Unlikely, Highly Unlikely. 'No 50/50s' — Derek refuses Chances About Even; that tier is Claude's only.
resolution_dates_diversity_flag: 11 of 17 current calls resolve EOY 2026 — future calls should spread to 2027, 2028, and beyond.
